flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bryan College-Dayton fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (57.9% → 49.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bryan College-Dayton rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $19.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Bryan College-Dayton rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.4k → $19.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bryan College-Dayton rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.5k → $23.0k).
